stories.title: Trump’s tariff machine is no longer trade policy. Congress should say so.

stories.title: White House pushes light-touch AI rules as states race ahead, setting up a tech policy fight in 2026
stories.dek: The administration’s new framework asks Congress to avoid a patchwork of state AI laws, but lawmakers, regulators and industry are already moving on their own.

stories.title: Why Europe’s new age-verification push is becoming a culture war over childhood online
stories.dek: As the EU rolls out an age-verification app and more countries tighten rules for minors, a once-technical policy debate is turning into a fast-moving fight over privacy, platform design and what it means to grow up online.

stories.title: Lebanon truce takes hold as US-Iran talks enter precarious final stretch
stories.dek: A short ceasefire in Lebanon is easing one front in a wider regional crisis, but the real test is whether Washington and Tehran can still bridge nuclear and security gaps before the truce expires.

stories.title: US-brokered Lebanon truce offers the first real pause in a widening regional war
stories.dek: A 10-day ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah is bringing displaced families home, but the deal’s narrow terms and excluded players show how fragile any wider peace remains.
